measures: Sequential identifier for one research run (one parameter configuration)
notes: Auto-increments; a single run writes one row per detector method

measures: Date the run was executed
Trading pair analyzed
Candle interval analyzed
Start date of the historical window pulled
notes: Data runs from this date to now; sets the lookback depth

measures: Number of OHLCV candles analyzed in this run
Consolidation detector used for this row
Whether this detector was the one measured in depth for the run
notes: Only the primary method gets episode-level distribution + correlation columns filled

measures: Number of consolidation periods this detector found
Mean episode length (duration)
notes: Across all episodes from this detector

measures: Mean box height (episode high-low span) relative to mid price
Fraction of episodes whose escape candle did NOT exceed the ATR or edge thresholds
notes: Lower = crisper detection (escapes are real breakouts not noise)

measures: Fraction of all bars that fell inside a detected consolidation
notes: High (>0.5) means the detector is too loose / labels most of the series as range

measures: Composite ranking heuristic for the detector
notes: = (1 - false_break_rate) * n_episodes / (1 + avg_width_pct); higher is better

measures: Median episode duration (primary method only)
Median box height relative to mid price (primary method only)
Median escape-candle true range divided by ATR (primary method only)
notes: Size of the breakout candle in ATR units; the stop-distance anchor for the future strategy

measures: Pearson correlation between width-contraction ratio and escape size (primary method only)
notes: Tests whether box shape predicts breakout magnitude; near 0 = shape is not predictive

measures: Detector parameters used for this row
Directory holding this run's full outputs (episode tables + charts)
notes: (metrics-only) when outputs were skipped for speed (sweeps)

measures: Free-text human note about the run
notes: Filled in by hand after reviewing the run
